# n8n Skills 1.0.1 hook compatibility fixture

This fixture is an exact subset of `n8n-io/skills` at commit
`c350f8b4bd8417108bce266d88e21b8a1bb966db` (plugin version `1.0.1`).
It contains only the manifests, hook files, and SessionStart meta-skill needed
to verify the bounded Windows compatibility transform and runtime JSON output.
Upstream is Apache-2.0 licensed. The fixture
must be reviewed, not automatically refreshed; unknown upstream shapes fail
closed and are handled through source-watch review.
